zh.Horningsheath, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可蕾托 霍尼亞斯
zh.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Drury是Sir Drogo Drury的兒子，於大約1125年出生在英國素福爾可蕾托 霍尼亞斯。他於大約1150年與Jane在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1220年享年97歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Drury是Sir Drogo Drury的儿子，于大约1125年出生在英国素福爾可蕾托 霍尼亞斯。他于大约1150年与Jane在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1220年享年97岁。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Drury was born about 1125, in Little Horningsheath, Suffolk, England as the son of Sir Drogo Drury. He married Jane about 1150, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died about 1220, at the age of 97.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Drury est né environ 1125, à Little Horningsheath, Suffolk, Angleterre, fils de Sir Drogo Drury. Il a épousé Jane environ 1150, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé environ 1220, à l’âge de 97 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Druryは約1125年にイギリススフォルクリットル ホールニングシェアスでSir Drogo Druryの息子として生まれた。約1150年にイギリスイギリスでJaneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は約1220年に97歳で死去した。

ko.Of, Horningsheath, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 호링거 c 이ck워스
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Drury(은)는 대략 1125년 영국 수폴크 리틀 호른잉셰앳h에서 Sir Drogo Drury의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1150년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Jane(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1220년 97세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Of, Horningsheath, Suffolk, England: хауррингир кум иккворт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Drury родился около 1125 г. в местности литл хаурнингшит, суффолк, Англия. Его отца звали Sir Drogo Drury. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane около 1150 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер около 1220 г. в возрасте 97 лет.
